description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the front FittingComfort        Wash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not scrub Dry flat/reverse Warm iron on reverse Get into the Rastafarian state of mind with this groovy tee from inkfruit. The cheeky graphic is a tribute to all the things that make Jamaica so appealing. Team this cotton tee with faded denims and fashionable lifestyle shoes available in a wide range at myntra for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
